name: ABUNDIA GLOBAL IMPACT GROUP, INC.
business: Abundia Global Impact Group, Inc. is a low-carbon energy solutions company that develops and commercializes low-carbon fuels and renewable chemical products from waste plastics and biomass. It uses licensed and proprietary process technologies to convert waste into hydrocarbon products. The company targets fuel distributors, refiners, airlines, marine fuel customers, and chemical manufacturers.

exposures.sentence: The Company, through AGIG LLC, is engaged in the development and commercialization of low carbon fuels and renewable chemical products derived from waste plastics and biomass feedstocks.
